revisedPrompt:
Create a polished production asset sheet for “EX-0007 side-profile path,” using the supplied reference image only as broad stylistic inspiration for clean hand-drawn dark contours, flat pastel fills, charming line imperfections, and whimsical natural detail. Do not copy any railway, figures, objects, or composition from the reference.

Canvas: one perfectly uniform, solid bright-magenta background (#ff00c8 or similarly vivid chroma magenta), with absolutely no gradient, texture, shadows, scenery, border, or panel dividers.

Layout: exactly six isolated side-view terrain assets arranged in a precise 3-column by 2-row grid. No panel lines. Every asset centered and fully contained inside its implied cell, with generous and even magenta padding and clear separation. No overlap.

Top row, left to right: exactly three compatible modular ground sections. Each is an identical-dimension wide 2:1 horizontal terrain chunk, seen strictly from the side. Each has an absolutely flat, straight grass walking surface at exactly the same vertical height. Each has straight vertical, joinable left and right edges. Beneath the grass, show warm layered soil with a few simple embedded stones and/or roots. All three must have the same silhouette, width, height, surface height, and edge geometry; vary only the internal natural details such as soil bands, roots, pebbles, and tiny grass shapes.

Bottom-left: one matching left start cap, same side-view terrain language, scale, walking-surface height, and soil depth. Its right edge is straight and joinable; its left outer end is a softly rounded/sloped natural cap.

Bottom-center: one matching right finish cap, mirrored functional counterpart. Its left edge is straight and joinable; its right outer end is a softly rounded/sloped natural cap. Same scale, surface height, and soil depth as the other terrain pieces.

Bottom-right: one small isolated fallen-gap accent consisting of exactly three loose stones with a few grass tufts, compact and centered, clearly separate from all other assets.

Visual style: clean hand-drawn dark blue-gray ink contours, slightly charming organic line imperfections, flat pastel fills only. Palette accents: aqua, leaf green, warm yellow, coral, warm layered earth tones, and paper-neutral cream. Crisp production-ready silhouettes; whimsical but simple world detail. No cast shadows. No gradients. No background texture.

Strict exclusions: no characters, creatures, railway elements, buildings, props, scenery behind assets, text, numbers, UI, labels, logos, watermark, branding, panel borders, extra assets, or decorative marks. Exactly six assets total.
prompt: Create one production asset sheet for the EX-0007 side-profile path requested by the user. Use the supplied image only as broad inspiration for clean hand-drawn dark contours, flat pastel fills, charming line imperfections, and whimsical world detail; do not copy its railway, figures, objects, or composition. On one perfectly uniform solid bright-magenta background, arrange exactly six isolated side-view terrain assets in a precise 3-column by 2-row grid with no panel lines. Top row: three compatible modular ground sections, each a wide 2:1 horizontal chunk with an absolutely flat grass walking surface at the same vertical height, warm layered soil and a few simple stones or roots below, straight joinable left and right edges, and identical dimensions; vary only the internal natural details. Bottom left: a matching left start cap. Bottom center: a matching right finish cap. Bottom right: a small isolated cluster of three loose stones and grass tufts for a fallen-gap accent. Use dark blue-gray ink outlines with aqua, leaf green, warm yellow, coral, and paper-neutral accents. Keep every asset centered and fully inside its cell with generous magenta padding. No scenery behind the assets, no characters, props, cast shadows, gradients or texture on the magenta background, text, numbers, UI, labels, logos, watermark, or branding.
